content_markdown:
# "Shield of Faith"
## Scripture
"And he put all things under his feet and gave him as head over all things to the church, which is his body, the fullness of him who fills all in all." – Ephesians 1:22-23

## Reflection
As men, we often face battles that seem too great for us to handle on our own. We may feel overwhelmed by the challenges of our daily lives, our relationships, and our spiritual walks. But the Bible reminds us that we are not alone. We have a Head, a Savior, and a Strengthener who has put all things under His feet. He is our Shield of Faith, protecting us from the enemy's attacks and empowering us to stand strong in the face of adversity. As we put on the armor of God, we must remember that our faith is not in our own abilities, but in the Power that resides within us. We are not just warriors, but we are warriors of Christ, equipped with the strength and courage we need to overcome any obstacle.

## Daily Challenge
"Run 1 mile while praying for God to be your strength in all battles."
